homepage.heroSubline: From historic homes in McKinney to modern Frisco developments, we protect what matters most. Serving North Texas families since 2012 with honest assessments and durable solutions.
aboutText: Eagle Shield Roofing began when founder Mark Reynolds noticed how Dallas' severe weather exposed homeowners to unnecessary risks. What started as a small crew repairing hail damage in Lake Highlands has grown into a 20+ team serving all of DFW.

We believe your roof is more than shingles—it's your family's first defense against Texas storms. That's why we use only premium materials rated for our climate and stand behind every installation with industry-leading warranties.

When we're not replacing roofs in Preston Hollow or repairing storm damage in Arlington, you'll find us sponsoring Little League teams and volunteering with Habitat for Humanity. This community raised us—we're proud to give back.

valueProps.title: Local Weather Expertise
valueProps.description: We specify materials that stand up to Dallas' hail storms and summer heat waves, not generic national standards.

valueProps.title: Historic Home Specialists

valueProps.title: No-Pressure Consultations

homepage.ctaSubline: Our Dallas-based team will assess your roof's condition and explain all options with no obligation.

services.name: Roof Replacement
services.shortDescription: Complete roof system upgrades tailored to Dallas' extreme weather patterns.
services.description:
When those Plano hailstorms finally take their toll or your Arlington ranch home's original roof reaches its limit, we provide full roof replacements designed for North Texas conditions. Our process begins with a thorough inspection of your decking and ventilation—we often find improper attic airflow exacerbates heat damage in Dallas' 100° summers.

For historic homes in McKinney's downtown district, we specialize in matching period-appropriate materials like cedar shakes with modern underlayment. In newer Frisco developments, we install impact-resistant shingles that meet strict HOA requirements while providing superior hail protection. Every replacement includes our 10-year workmanship warranty on top of manufacturer coverage.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive inspection including infrared moisture scans and attic assessment
Step 2: Customized material recommendations for your home's style and local weather risks
Step 3: Efficient tear-off with full debris containment and magnetized nail pickup
Step 4: Precision installation with attention to flashing details at chimneys and vents
benefits: Energy-efficient options to reduce AC costs in Texas heat
Class 4 impact-resistant shingles available for hail-prone areas
Preservation techniques for historic district compliance
Financing options with local credit unions

faq.question: How do I know if I need repairs or full replacement?
faq.answer: We evaluate multiple factors including shingle granule loss, moisture penetration in decking, and the age of your current roof. In Dallas' climate, most asphalt roofs need replacement by 12-15 years.

faq.question: Will you help with my insurance claim?
faq.answer: Our DFW storm damage specialists document all hail/wind damage per carrier requirements and can meet with adjusters directly.

services.name: Storm Damage Repair
services.shortDescription: Emergency fixes and long-term solutions after North Texas' violent weather.
services.description:
When those spring squall lines roll through Frisco or a microburst hits Lake Highlands, we're the team Dallas homeowners call for prompt, professional storm damage repairs. Unlike general contractors who dabble in roofing, we focus exclusively on roof systems—that specialization shows in our ability to diagnose hidden structural issues after high winds.

For minor hail damage in Plano subdivisions, we often perform targeted shingle replacements using color-matched materials from local suppliers. In severe cases like the 2023 tornado near Reunion Tower, we handle complete emergency tarping and coordinate directly with insurance providers. Our crews carry manufacturer-certified training for all major synthetic underlayments and ice/water shield products proven in DFW's climate.
process: Step 1: 24/7 emergency response with temporary leak stabilization
Step 2: Detailed damage documentation for insurance claims
Step 3: Structural assessment beyond visible surface damage
Step 4: Precision repairs using weather-matched materials
benefits: Local dispatch centers in Dallas and Fort Worth
Direct work with Allstate, State Farm and other regional adjusters
Wind mitigation techniques for future storm protection
No upfront payments when working with insurance

faq.question: How soon can you respond after a major storm?
faq.answer: We prioritize by safety risk, with same-day emergency tarping for active leaks. Most assessments occur within 48 hours of contact.

faq.question: What if my roof looks fine but I suspect damage?
faq.answer: We perform free inspections using telescoping cameras to check for lifted shingles or compromised seals not visible from the ground.

services.name: Commercial Roofing
services.shortDescription: Durable solutions for DFW businesses from Deep Ellum cafes to Plano office parks.
services.description:
Dallas-Fort Worth's commercial properties face unique roofing challenges—from the flat roofs on Uptown high-rises to the sprawling warehouse districts near DFW Airport. We bring 12 years of specialized experience installing and maintaining commercial roofing systems that stand up to Texas' temperature swings and business demands.

For restaurants in Bishop Arts District, we install odor-resistant PVC membranes that handle kitchen exhaust. Tech campuses in Legacy West benefit from our cool roof installations that lower urban heat island effect. Every project includes after-hours and weekend work options to minimize business disruption, plus detailed warranty documentation for property managers.
process: Step 1: Facility assessment including core cuts and moisture surveys
Step 2: System recommendation based on building use and DFW weather data
Step 3: Phased installation with noise/dust control measures
Step 4: Post-installation infrared scan to confirm integrity
benefits: Class A fire-rated systems for multi-tenant buildings
EnergyStar-rated materials for green building compliance
Custom maintenance plans with semi-annual inspections

faq.question: What's the typical lifespan of a commercial roof in DFW?
faq.Answer: Depending on material, most last 15-30 years—but our maintenance programs can extend that by addressing minor issues before they escalate.

faq.question: Can you work around our business hours?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We regularly schedule nighttime and weekend work for retail centers and office buildings.

serviceAreas.content: From the Craftsman bungalows near TCU to the ranch homes in River Oaks, Fort Worth residents trust us for roof replacements that blend historical charm with modern durability. We understand how the Trinity River valley's unique wind patterns require specialized flashing techniques, especially in older neighborhoods like Fairmount. Our team regularly works with Fort Worth's historic preservation commission to source appropriate materials for pre-war homes while meeting current energy codes.
serviceAreas.localContext: Fort Worth's mix of historic and mid-century homes needs roofing solutions that balance preservation with hail resistance.

serviceAreas.content: Serving Plano since 2015, we know how HOA requirements in communities like Willow Bend and Deerfield affect roofing choices. The 1980s-90s homes throughout Collin County often need complete roof system upgrades—not just shingle replacements—due to outdated ventilation standards. We specialize in integrating modern synthetic underlayments and ridge vents while maintaining the clean lines Plano homeowners associations demand.
serviceAreas.localContext: Plano's established neighborhoods require roofs that meet strict aesthetic guidelines while withstanding summer storms.

reviews.name: James T.
reviews.text: When the hailstorm hit our Preston Hollow home last April, Eagle Shield had our roof tarped within hours—even though it was Sunday. Their detailed documentation helped us get full insurance coverage for the replacement. The crew took extra care around our antique clay roof tiles.

reviews.name: Lisa R.
reviews.text: Our Deep Ellum music venue had chronic leaks until Eagle Shield installed a custom TPO system. They worked nights to avoid disrupting shows and trained our maintenance staff on simple inspections. Two Texas summers later—still bone dry inside.
